Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – eMalahleni Batch #001 – 48 MT Thermal Coal, CV 4,800 kcal/kg
Description: 48 MT thermal coal (CV 4,800 kcal/kg, sulphur 0.8%, ash 18%) from licensed small-scale open-pit operation in eMalahleni, Mpumalanga. DMRE small-scale mining licence SMML-MP-2025-0034. Safety compliance certificate Mine Health & Safety Inspectorate MHSI-2025-0034. SARS mineral royalty receipt ROY-COL-2025-0034.

Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – Middelburg Batch #002 – 65 MT Thermal Coal, CV 5,100 kcal/kg
Description: 65 MT thermal coal (CV 5,100 kcal/kg, sulphur 0.6%, ash 15%) from licensed small-scale colliery near Middelburg. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0045. MHSI safety cert MHSI-2025-0045. SARS royalty ROY-COL-2025-0045. DFFE environmental management report EMR-2025-0034.

Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – Hendrina Batch #003 – 42 MT Thermal Coal, CV 4,600 kcal/kg
Description: 42 MT thermal coal (CV 4,600 kcal/kg) from Hendrina small-scale colliery licence. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0056. MHSI cert MHSI-2025-0056. Supply agreement with Eskom Hendrina Power Station (emergency top-up supply). SARS royalty ROY-COL-2025-0056.

Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – eMalahleni Batch #004 – 78 MT Thermal Coal, CV 4,900 kcal/kg
Description: 78 MT thermal coal (CV 4,900 kcal/kg, sulphur 0.7%) from eMalahleni licensed small-scale open-pit B block. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0067. MHSI MHSI-2025-0067. DFFE EMR-2025-0045. SARS royalty ROY-COL-2025-0067. Sold to Vametco Minerals for plant fuel use.

Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – Ogies Batch #005 – 55 MT Thermal Coal, CV 5,200 kcal/kg
Description: 55 MT thermal coal (CV 5,200 kcal/kg, ash 13%) from licensed small-scale colliery near Ogies village. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0078. MHSI-2025-0078. SARS royalty ROY-COL-2025-0078. Sold to Pherecydes Brickworks under low-grade coal supply agreement SA-COAL-2025-0045.

Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – Witbank Batch #006 – 88 MT Thermal Coal, CV 5,000 kcal/kg
Description: 88 MT thermal coal (CV 5,000 kcal/kg, sulphur 0.7%, ash 16%) from licensed Witbank colliery block. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0089. MHSI cert. DFFE EMR-2025-0056. SARS royalty ROY-COL-2025-0089. Sold to local brick and cement producers under supply agreement.

Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – Kriel Batch #007 – 36 MT Thermal Coal, CV 4,700 kcal/kg
Description: 36 MT thermal coal (CV 4,700 kcal/kg) from Kriel area licensed small-scale open-pit. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0101. MHSI cert MHSI-2025-0101. DFFE EMR-2025-0067. SARS royalty ROY-COL-2025-0101. Community coal supply to Kriel town for household use (subsidised rate).

Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – Middelburg Batch #008 – 72 MT Thermal Coal, CV 5,300 kcal/kg
Description: 72 MT thermal coal (CV 5,300 kcal/kg, premium local grade) from second Middelburg colliery block. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0112. MHSI MHSI-2025-0112. SARS royalty ROY-COL-2025-0112. Sold to Middelburg Steel and Alloys for process heat generation.

Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – eMalahleni Batch #009 – 94 MT Thermal Coal, CV 5,000 kcal/kg
Description: 94 MT thermal coal (CV 5,000 kcal/kg) from eMalahleni small-scale C block. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0123. MHSI MHSI-2025-0123. DFFE EMR-2025-0078. SARS royalty ROY-COL-2025-0123. Sold to Richards Bay Coal Terminal agent for export batch aggregation.

Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – Ogies Batch #010 – 61 MT Thermal Coal, CV 5,100 kcal/kg
Description: 61 MT thermal coal (CV 5,100 kcal/kg) from Ogies colliery second block. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0134. MHSI MHSI-2025-0134. SARS royalty ROY-COL-2025-0134. Sold to Pherecydes Brickworks additional supply order. Community employment report: 38 jobs created.

Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – Witbank Batch #011 – 105 MT Thermal Coal, CV 5,000 kcal/kg
Description: 105 MT thermal coal from Witbank C block colliery. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0145. MHSI MHSI-2025-0145. DFFE EMR-2025-0089. SARS royalty ROY-COL-2025-0145. Sold to cement manufacturer PPC Hercules plant for kiln fuel. Coal quality certificate CQ-2025-0145.

Name: Mpumalanga Coal Cooperative – Hendrina Batch #012 – 50 MT Thermal Coal, CV 4,800 kcal/kg
Description: 50 MT thermal coal (CV 4,800 kcal/kg) from Hendrina area second block. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0156. MHSI MHSI-2025-0156. DFFE EMR-2025-0101. SARS royalty ROY-COL-2025-0156. Year-end production batch. Community social contribution report submitted to DMRE.

Name: DMRE Small-Scale Coal Licence – eMalahleni Block EML-SSM-001 – 2.4 ha
Description: DMRE small-scale coal mining licence EML-SSM-001, eMalahleni, Mpumalanga. 2.4 ha. Mineral: thermal coal. DMRE licence SMML-MP-2025-0034. DFFE-EA-2025-0034. DWS-WUL-2025-0034. Mine health and safety plan approved by MHSI. Community benefit: 25 permanent jobs. Social and labour plan submitted.

Name: DMRE Small-Scale Coal Licence – Middelburg Block MDB-SSM-001 – 1.8 ha
Description: DMRE coal licence MDB-SSM-001, Middelburg, Mpumalanga. 1.8 ha. Thermal coal. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0045. DFFE-EA-2025-0045. DWS-WUL-2025-0045. MHSI safety plan. Community employment: 18 permanent jobs. Rehabilitation fund ZAR 45,000 deposited.

Name: DMRE Small-Scale Coal Licence – Hendrina Block HND-SSM-001 – 1.5 ha
Description: DMRE coal licence HND-SSM-001, Hendrina, Mpumalanga. 1.5 ha. Thermal coal. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0056. DFFE-EA-2025-0056. DWS-WUL-2025-0056. MHSI safety compliance. Women-led cooperative (6 female directors). Community employment 14 jobs. Eskom supply agreement.

Name: DMRE Small-Scale Coal Licence – Ogies Block OGS-SSM-001 – 2.0 ha
Description: DMRE coal licence OGS-SSM-001, Ogies, Mpumalanga. 2.0 ha. Thermal coal (high CV). DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0067. DFFE-EA-2025-0067. DWS-WUL-2025-0067. MHSI plan. Community employment 22 jobs. Local municipal power station supply agreement.

Name: DMRE Small-Scale Coal Licence – Witbank Block WBK-SSM-001 – 2.8 ha
Description: DMRE coal licence WBK-SSM-001, Witbank/eMalahleni, Mpumalanga. 2.8 ha. Thermal coal (high-grade). DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0078. DFFE-EA-2025-0078. DWS-WUL-2025-0078. MHSI plan. 28 permanent jobs. Richards Bay Coal Terminal aggregate supply agreement.

Name: DMRE Small-Scale Coal Licence – Kriel Block KRL-SSM-001 – 1.2 ha
Description: DMRE coal licence KRL-SSM-001, Kriel, Mpumalanga. 1.2 ha. Thermal coal (community supply grade). DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0089. DFFE-EA-2025-0089. DWS-WUL-2025-0089. MHSI plan. 12 jobs. Community supply mandate for subsidised household coal.

Name: DMRE Small-Scale Coal Licence – eMalahleni Block EML-SSM-002 – 1.6 ha (Expansion)
Description: DMRE coal expansion licence EML-SSM-002, eMalahleni, Mpumalanga. 1.6 ha additional block adjacent to EML-SSM-001. DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0101. DFFE-EA-2025-0101. DWS-WUL-2025-0101. MHSI plan approved. 16 additional jobs. Richards Bay Coal Terminal export supply.

Name: SARS Mineral Royalty – Coal Q1 2025 – ZAR 152,720
Description: SARS mineral royalty for Q1 2025 coal production (all MCMC licensed blocks). Royalty rate 0.5% unrefined coal under MPRDA. Computed on 155 MT at ZAR 27,200/MT average sale price. SARS receipt MR-COL-2025-Q1-0034. Amount: ZAR 152,720.

Name: SARS Mineral Royalty – Coal Q2 2025 – ZAR 218,500
Description: SARS coal royalty Q2 2025. 0.5% on 221 MT sold. SARS receipt MR-COL-2025-Q2-0045. Covers batches #004 through #007. Average sale price ZAR 27,200/MT (RBCT index). Amount: ZAR 218,500.

Name: SARS Mineral Royalty – Coal Q3 2025 – ZAR 281,600
Description: SARS coal royalty Q3 2025. 0.5% on 284 MT sold (batches #008 through #011). Average sale price ZAR 27,200/MT. SARS receipt MR-COL-2025-Q3-0056. Amount: ZAR 281,600.

Name: SARS Mineral Royalty – Coal Q4 2025 – ZAR 136,000
Description: SARS coal royalty Q4 2025. 0.5% on 50 MT sold (batch #012). Average sale price ZAR 27,200/MT. SARS receipt MR-COL-2025-Q4-0067. Includes MPRDA compliance certificate and DMRE production returns MPR-Q4-2025-0156. Amount: ZAR 136,000.

Name: DMRE Annual Licence Fee 2025 – ZAR 82,000
Description: Annual licence fee paid to DMRE for 7 small-scale coal mining blocks (eMalahleni×2, Middelburg, Hendrina, Ogies, Witbank, Kriel). DMRE invoice DMRE-ALF-2025-0034. Total fee ZAR 82,000 (ZAR 8,000–15,000 per block depending on size). Receipt DMRE-REC-2025-0034.

Name: DFFE Rehabilitation Bond Contribution 2025 – ZAR 245,000
Description: Annual rehabilitation fund contribution to DFFE for open-pit coal mining environmental rehabilitation obligations. ZAR 245,000 based on DFFE-prescribed quantum for 13.3 ha total licensed area. DFFE receipt DFFE-RHB-2025-0034. Financial provision lodged with ABSA Bank under DFFE escrow agreement.
